decisions.rationale: Locked NID portal with immediate request for someone to unlock it; matches service unlock intent.
Explicitly asks 'you' to open/unlock the locked account immediately.
Only asks whether urgent unlock is possible; lacks direct support/agent service request or 'করেদিতে' framing.
Asks how the user can get it unlocked quickly, which is a how-to/process intent rather than direct agent unlock request.
Blocked NID access with request for on-the-spot unlock; fits immediate service unlock intent.
Locked account asks if it can be unlocked now; passive but clearly an immediate unlock service request.
Explicitly asks 'you' to open the blocked NID login immediately.
Asks for the way to get a copy after profile block; this is a how-to/download-copy intent, not agent action on behalf.
Asks whether download can be arranged/done while profile is locked, matching on-behalf download service intent.
Uses account recovery framing rather than unlock/open-for-me request, colliding with recovery intent.
Asks if you can urgently do 'something' for a blocked ID; too vague for this specific unlock/download request tag.
Profile block plus asks whether you can immediately unblock it; direct service intent.
Asks to open the closed/locked ID immediately, matching direct unlock service request.
Asks whether it will be unlocked immediately, more of a status/timing question than a request for support to unlock it.
Focuses on downloading from Gazipur/location while account is locked; not a direct support unlock or on-behalf download request.
Asks for the way to get an NID copy after profile block, a how-to/copy retrieval intent rather than direct service.
Directly asks if the inactive account can be enabled now; close equivalent to immediate unlock request.
Polite direct request to open the locked NID login immediately.
The 'instant unlock token' concept is artificial and asks about a token, not support unlocking the account.
Asks how the user can download NID after lock; self/how-to download intent, not agent unlocking or downloading on behalf.
Asks whether the user can open it themselves immediately; self-service, not support/agent unlock request.
Blocked NID account with immediate request for manual opening; fits direct unlock service intent.
Statement about urgent download need due to being in Rangpur; no direct request for support to unlock or download on behalf.
Asks by what method the user will download after account lock; how-to download intent rather than direct service request.

result.packet_rationale: Kept rows that directly ask support/agent, explicitly or implicitly, to unlock/open/unblock/enable a locked NID account now or to have download done on the user’s behalf. Flagged rows that ask for methods, ways, self-service, recovery, location-specific download, vague action, timing/status, or artificial token concepts rather than a direct unlock/download service request.
